entry.title: Re: ways to start as a Consultant

Getting in the SAP as a consultant is not that easy as people think, what is your SAP Technology certification name, what did you do? Tell us more about your qualifications so we can help you more precisely.

Regards,

Syed

entry.title: Creating Training Guides in SAP
entry.content: I created a few SOP's for SAP ERP PRD use in a warehouse. Mainly codes 331/ 341 (receiving), 412 (Queue)/ 414 (Warehouse Order) for processing and consuming HU's. Also 523 to "Box move" HU's and flipping Kanbans. I will leave a few snippets below, any feedback is appreciated.

entry.title: Change of bank key in banks and house bank
entry.content:
Hi SAP professionals,

We have a client S/4 HANA public cloud implementation project. We have created the bank - house bank - bank account - house bank account structure in DEV system and related to that also the bank determination config has been done based on that, using HB and HBA codes. 

Now the client wants to have bank key in bank changed from randomly what was in legacy system to SWIFT/BIC code. In 2 bank accounts for 2 banks, there are transactions already in DEV and TEST. 

How should we carry out the setup step by step in the right order. We only get errors referring to that something is in use already. 

Appreciate your comments very soon!

Br,

ME

entry.title: Re: Ponting in period 13 (parameterization)
entry.content: Dear Ismael, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: SAP CALM - monitoring Features - availability
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We want to know if the below features are available in SAP Cloud ALM. I tried to configure the below features but I couldn't find them. Please let us know if the below features can be configured in SAP Cloud ALM.

  1. Error tracking & analysis
  2. Transaction tracing
  3. Database monitoring
  4. Custom dashboards
  5. Third party integration
  6. Log management
  7. Distributed Tracing
  8. Anomaly detection
  9. Cloud & on-Prem monitoring
  10. Mobile app monitoring
  11. Serverless monitoring
  12. Exception monitoring
  13. Mobile network monitoring
  14. Dash boards

 

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM - monitoring Features - availability
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM only offers monitoring for on-premise SAP systems and Software as a Service (SaaS) SAP products. Many of the functionalities you have listed may have different names in SAP Cloud ALM (e.g. "Error tracking & analysis" could be considered the same as "Integration Monitoring"). Some of the functionality you have listed is not supported by SAP Cloud ALM (e.g. Transaction tracing). This KBA will help you to find out what Operations (monitoring) functionality is available for our currently supported SAP products, and direct you to the relevant setup guides: 3426195 - What SAP Cloud ALM monitoring and metrics are available for my SAP product? 

For a list of planned features for SAP Cloud ALM, you can refer to this KBA: 3497411 - Where to find information about planned SAP Cloud ALM features and functionality?

Integrations with third party software can be achieved by using the SAP Cloud ALM APIs. SAP Cloud ALM doesn't offer the ability to create Custom dashboards, so these APIs can be used also to achieve this. More information is found in this KBA: 3527246 - Retrieve SAP Cloud ALM data using an API

entry.title: Re: Change of bank key in banks and house bank

entry.title: Re: Error while sending quote from Commerce to CPQ
entry.content:
Hello @Hemasundar1 

Please check the comment of @akhilesh595, if the product is not active in the system, please activate it and test it again from a brand new quote as some changes are not applied to already created quotes.
If the issue persists after you check all the configuration, I suggest you to create a case to SAP CPQ Support team.

Best regards,
Eric Silva

I recommend you to raise an enhancement request in influence portal: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2671

entry.title: Which changes in object(class or function) can case regenerate related code/objects
entry.content:
I want to know which changes i do in class ( like add parameter to exist method or add new method ) can case to regenerte all the places that used this class when relase the cr that upload the class changes

 

I know that there is log in se01 to see all generation object but this is after the cr released...

 

I want this because every time when i release cr to production all the application not working because all the regenerting so i think to isolate some fearers that will not be dependent in another class or function so this isolate feater will work even i release cr anless i  do changes in the isolated class

If i know how the regenerate working i will know better how to isolate this featers

Thank u

entry.title: Re: CrystalReportViewer SelectionFormula not setted after...
entry.content:
Not sure why it worked before but what you did is the correct way...

Which is what I posted:

btnRecordSelectionForm.Text += "\nDon Report Selection Forrmula" + rpt.RecordSelectionFormula.ToString() + "\n";

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA International Trade – Managing Licenses
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks a lot for this information. We are trying to use this feature for supporting our business requirements in Europe where some of the products require a Government provided "Authorization Code" based on country. The idea was to use control class and a license by control class and assign products to the control class.

Can you help with the following:

a. In the definition of the license type, there is a category for license category. Can you help with what each of the categories does / how we may use it ?

b. In the definition of the legal control, there is a specific check box for Domestic processes and for check of EU processes. Do these have to be activated if you have activated for outbound processes and you want to check a legal control for domestic transactions ?

Appreciate your help 

Regards

entry.title: An Update to the HCM Payroll Bridge options for SAP SuccessFactors clients: Part 3
entry.content:
An Update to the HCM Payroll Bridge options for SAP SuccessFactors clients: Part 3

SAP has announced a new offering designed to assist customers navigating for the largest, most complex deployments. This initiative aims to support organizations transitioning from on-premise SAP ERP systems to modern, cloud-based solutions while optimizing business processes and enhancing agility.

For Human Capital Management (HCM) and Payroll customers, this transformation specifically involves migrating from on-premise SAP ECC HCM and Payroll to SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll in the cloud. Since SAP first introduced its migration strategy, many customers have proactively embraced innovation and accelerated their journey to the cloud. The urgency surrounding this shift is further outlined in SAP’s blog on the SAP Business Suite 7 extension and its implications for HCM clients.

SAP SuccessFactors has remained committed to its existing customer base by offering extended timelines and flexible options to ensure organizations maximize their return on investment. This commitment is detailed in SAP’s discussion on bridge options for SAP SuccessFactors clients, including insights into SAP HCM for S/4HANA On-Premise as an interim solution.

While the introduction of this new transition option provides additional flexibility, it is unlikely to significantly alter most HCM customers' cloud migration strategies. The ultimate destination remains SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll, with this offering serving as a specialized solution for organizations with particularly complex requirements.

What is SAP ERP, Private Edition, Transition option?

SAP is introducing a new cloud subscription offering intended only for large-scale and complex systems centered around SAP ECC, accompanied by a suite of dedicated services designed to support the transition to SAP cloud ERP. This solution will also ensure business continuity by providing security, legal, and software patches. Customers will be able to purchase the offering starting in 2028, with availability for use between 2031 and 2033.

SAP is announcing this in advance to accommodate customers with complex IT landscapes, ensuring they have ample time to plan accordingly.

This offering is entirely optional. Customers who complete their transition to SAP cloud ERP by the end of 2030 will not require it. The SAP ERP, private edition, transition option, is specifically designed for those who need additional time and assistance in their journey.

Key details include:

  • The offering will focus on SAP ECC and will not cover the full SAP Business Suite 7, which remains available for subscription only until the end of 2030. SAP will clarify the scope of eligible products later this year.
  • Systems intending to leverage this transition option must be migrated to SAP ERP, private edition, before the close of 2030.
  • Subscribing to this offering between 2031 and 2033 will require specific preparations, including the exclusive use of SAP HANA as the supported database and additional adjustments due to the discontinuation of older third-party technologies, such as certain Java versions.

Further details will be disclosed as the 2028 purchase availability date approaches. The recommended path following this offering will be a full transition to SAP cloud ERP.

It is important to note that this is not an extension of SAP ERP maintenance, and there are no changes to the roadmap for on-premise SAP ERP systems beyond 2030.

The SAP ERP, private edition, transition option will be available at a higher cost in 2031-2033 compared to an equivalent ERP cloud subscription before 2031. Additional details will be shared during the broader launch in Q2 2025 and as the contractual availability date in 2028 approaches.

The Payroll Transformation Options 2025

The table originally published in the What is SAP HCM for S/4HANA On-Premise (H4S4)? blog in 2022 now includes the newly introduced transition option.

This expanded framework presents a range of choices for HCM and Payroll customers, spanning from minimal innovation to full-scale transformation leveraging AI. The revised table offers greater clarity on the available pathways, ensuring organizations can make informed decisions based on their specific business needs and timelines.

 

Option

Payroll

Description

Learn more

1

SAP ERP HCM Payroll On-Premise

Business as usual SAP SuccessFactors has given a commitment to their approximately 9,000 on-premise SAP Payroll customers that they will not experience an interruption in their continuous world-class support, guaranteed until calendar year end 2025.

SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management Customers 

2

SAP ERP HCM Payroll On-Premise with extended support

Business as usual with an extended support date.

SAP announced an extended maintenance for SAP Business Suite 7 by two additional years for mainstream maintenance until 2027. Customers who want to continue to use the SAP ERP HCM beyond 2027 will have an extended maintenance option, available beginning in 2028, until the end of 2030 for a premium of two percent above existing maintenance prices.

SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management Customers 

3

SAP HCM for S/4 HANA On-Premise (H4S4)

 

Extend on-premise with an S/4HANA upgrade An offering for customers who wish to extend their current investment in SAP ERP HCM. This offering synced with the SAP S/4HANA release and can be deployed either within the SAP S/4HANA environment or run standalone. H4S4 will allow continued use of the on-premise SAP® talent solutions, including learning and recruiting (subject to licensing). This offering is not available for net new clients.

What is SAP HCM for S/4HANA On-Premise (H4S4)?

4

SAP ERP, private edition, transition option

Designed for complex customers with special needs Available starting in 2028 and will be active for usage from 2031-2033.

It is an additional and non-mandatory offering. Customers who are planning to complete their transformation journey by the end of 2030 will not need it.

New Offering to Help Navigate Complex RISE with SAP Transformations

5

SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE)

Non-disruptive pathway to digital transformation This offering, aligned with the  program, is part of SAP’s ongoing commitment to helping customers continue to get ROI from their on-premise SAP investment, while creating a bridge to the cloud and the future. This is a non-disruptive way to keep your HR, Payroll Time and/or Benefits via a cost-effective pathway to the cloud, while retaining the functional richness of your existing systems. This option involves migrating to an SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (S/4 PCE) subscription, moving your environment to SAP’s own data center or to a hyperscaler (Azure, GCP, AWS). A conversion from on-premise SAP ERP HCM licenses to PCE cloud subscriptions is also required.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Private Edition

6

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll

Innovation The current focus of innovation with approximately 1800+ customers and 52 local versions.  And this option is SAP SuccessFactors

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll

How do you know what option is best for you?

SAP and SAP Partner transformation vendors offer free assessments and tools including the use of the SAP Readiness Check for SAP SuccessFactors solutions, for customers with maintenance agreements to analyze the existing SAP ERP HCM implementation in preparation for a transition to SAP SuccessFactors. The evaluation of this data for making decisions on your next steps should be done in conjunction with an expert.  This early insight enables you to scope and plan your transition project with a higher degree of accuracy.  To get started visit https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2022/12/5e3a59f3-557e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Hi Nikhil
Another idea, we could also add a threshold to the global array.
When the size reaches a certain limit, e.g. 100 then automatically trigger the data action and clear out the array for further tracking.

regards, Chris

entry.title: Pay slip dispay in EC using mash-ups
entry.content:
Dear all,

If customer would like to use mash-ups to display Pay slips in SF EC for employees (Payroll is run on S/4), how is it possible to control to dispay only last payroll results? In case of several payroll runs to correct the errors, how to prevent to see them all?

Thank you,

Jasminka

entry.title: Need a SOC-1 type report for SAP BRIM & RAR. What reporting is available from SAP?
entry.content:
I understand that SAP does not have a SOC-1 report generated for the SAP BRIM or SAP RAR products.

 

Is there any other SOC-1 or ISO-27001 report generated for SAP that address the SAP BRIM and/or SAP RAR products? What report or reports are these? Please provide a link to request these. Thank you

entry.title: I am trying to change referral bonus on the job classification in manage data
entry.content: I did a mass load to Job Classification data, but the Referral Bonus value didn't populate. The object definition for Job Classification includes a custom field for Referral Bonus (picklist). I have already added the value to the picklist.  How do I populate the Referral Bonus on Job Classification so it carries over to Position?  Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in S/4HANA 2023 for IS-Oil and Gas
entry.content: Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Multiple Errors With XSA Application After Updating Builder
entry.content:
I have an XSA Application that was built in the Web IDE and was running fine without issues up until last week. When trying to run the application in the Web IDE I received a message that the builder was outdated and needed updated, which i did. Since doing that I've received multiple inconsistent errors when trying to build that are making difficult to pinpoint the issue:

- Build is failing with bad gateway sometimes, sometimes it goes through but fails at a later point in the process

- No builder installed in space, despite also saying that one is properly installed:

- I've confirmed in the XSA cockpit the di-builder is "started". I've tried reinstalling the builder, sometimes it will continue to throw the no builder installed, sometimes it will progress further in the build process but tell me no matching dependency found for various dependencies. hdext and uuid are the two I've ran into so far, despite the versions being available in the registry. Updating the hdbext dependency to the latest version fixes that one, although it sometimes switches back to saying even the latest version cannot be found. Same with uuid, I was already using the "latest" tag in my package.json but even manually declaring it as the latest version still results in "no matching version found". 

- It also randomly says a list of spaces cannot be found, which reloading the page typically fixes

 

It seems to cycle through these different errors somewhat randomly. Would greatly appreciate it if anyone has any suggestions on how to fix this issue.

How to remove a person from getting Cloud Notifications?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Management of S-user's Cloud Notifications
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Regarding the request of stop notifications for a S-user, it is mandatory to contact a Super Admin, who has to manage the notifications to the required S-user, accordingly the steps on KBA 2896942 - How Super and Cloud Administrators manage Cloud Notification subscriptions for other users - SAP for Me.

Thank you,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Error while sending quote from Commerce to CPQ
entry.content: Thank you . The issue is resolved. The Product is active in SAP CPQ and there an issue with Mapping. Its incorrectly mapped in BTP -ISU

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with Background Jobs in SAP
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing!

I'm quite confused what is the use of this program. It reads 200k records from VBAK, then calls BAPI 200k times and then what? What would this achieve?

This "poor man's parallel processing" is usually used not for reading data but rather for posting / updating something. In the old systems like ECC, some postings required very long time. 3 seconds to post a document (unusual when BDC is involved) results in hours and even days when you need to post massive amount of them. So that's where you'd start spinning off multiple background jobs. Such activities would happen typically at the end of the month, during migration, initial data upload, etc.

Just to read the data we can obviously start multiple jobs too, but I don't see what purpose this could possibly serve. What would you do with the data in the end? How would you collect it from the multiple jobs?

There also don't seem to be any safeguards in place to prevent too many jobs from being generated. Basis folks won't be happy about this. 🙂 Sorry, I think this example choice is just not good. And the code is... not great either, sorry. You might want to check out Clean ABAP when you have time.

And one important correction. It says "Unlike a single process that might fail and cause a dump, background jobs run independently[...]". What caused a dump was not just a "single process", it was a dialog process. If you just ran the same thing as 1 job vs N jobs, it'd take more time but wouldn't cause a time-out dump.

There was another blog post about different approach to parallel processing. That post itself is not the best, but there were some good comments and links to other posts: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/parallel-processing-on-oabap-using-classes-and-methods/ba-p/13557161

entry.title: Re: Cutover plan and Condition Contract Management
entry.content: Hi @gvictor , could you please give some more inputs on 2.c approach of creating historical data with proforma settlement document. I couldn't find any documentation on this on CCM Sales rebate scenario.

entry.title: Error sending Java request to cloud-cap-samples-java
entry.content:
I'm trying to send a request using Java to the application e.g http://localhost:8080/api/admin/Addresses but I keep getting 401 unauthorized even though I'm sending the request with the required credentials. I'm using the admin user for this request so username is admin and password is also admin.

This is the Java code I'm trying to use to accomplish this: 

 

HttpClient client = HttpClient.newHttpClient();
HttpRequest request = HttpRequest.newBuilder()
.uri(URI.create("http://localhost:8080/api/admin/Addresses"))
.GET()
.header("Accept", "application/json")
.header("Content-Type", "application/json")
.header("Authorization", "Basic YWRtaW46YWRtaW4=")
.build();

It works when I'm sending it with Postman, Curl, I even tried to use Node.js and there were no issues but I can't seem to send the request with Java.

entry.title: Find materials with the status of "with replacement" but none set up in VB11
entry.content: Hey all, newbie here. From time to time I get requests from my CSRs to identify the replacement material for an item that has been set to "with replacement" by an automated process and no substitution has been established. Is there a way to craft a report that would show me all materials flagged as having a replacement but that do not have one determined?

entry.title: Assistance on Extracting Data from SAP BOFC to SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am reaching out to request your assistance regarding the extraction of data from SAP BusinessObjects Financial Consolidation (BOFC) to SAP BW/4HANA.

Could you please guide me through the steps, tools, or best practices to achieve this extraction? Below, I have provided details about the target system version:

  • SAP BW/4HANA Version:  SAP BW/4HANA 2021.

Thank you in advance for your support and expertise.

entry.title: Configure your SAP Business Network Supplier Account and Start Transacting
entry.content:
So, your customer has invited you to join SAP Business Network to digitally collaborate and do business together in a more efficient way, increasing transparency and trust. You’ve registered for an account. Now what? 

To make sure you are receiving orders on your preferred channel, confirming orders for your customers, and able to send invoices, there are a couple of configurations you must make to your account to ensure your transactions run smoothly. 

1. Set up your order routing 

You can choose where you prefer to have order notifications sent based on what works best for you. If you prefer to receive your orders via email, then you can choose that as an option. If you upgrade to an SAP Business Network, enterprise account and integrate with your ERP, then you can choose that as an option for your orders. 

Set up email notifications for orders: 

  1. Log in to your account
  2. Navigate to the ‘Getting Started’ menu > Configure order preferences > electronic order routing
  3. Find the ‘New orders’ section 
  4. Change the routing method to your preference 
  5. If choosing ‘email’, ensure the correct email address is listed 
  6. Check the option for ‘attach PDF document in the message’

2. Send an order confirmation

When you receive an order from your customer through SAP Business Network, you’ll receive an email notification. The first thing to do then is to confirm the order indicating that you’ve received it and whether you’re able to fulfill it.  
To process the order, follow these steps:  

  1. Click on Process Order from the email you received. 
  2. Log in to your account. 
  3. Verify your company details, make edits as required and confirm. 

Check out this short video for a step-by-step tutorial. 

Read how to send an order confirmation.

3. Send an invoice 

Many buyers on SAP Business Network enable their suppliers to send invoices in addition to order confirmations, and it’s easy to do so with your standard account. If your customer has enabled this feature, please follow these steps to send an invoice:  

  1. Click on Process Order. 
  2. Log in to your account. 
  3. Click the Create Invoice button. 
  4. Review and submit. 

Check out this short video for a detailed process. 

Read how to send an invoice. 

4. Complete your account and company settings configuration 

Once you’ve complete the tasks above, read what else you should do to configure your user account information and company settings. 

5. Assign permissions to sub-users 

If you enabled any sub-users in the previous step, then you need to ensure they have the proper permissions granted to access needed documents and functionality.  

Read through the permissions available then: login into your account > click on your initials in the top right corner > click ‘Settings’ > click ‘Users’ > create roles with necessary permissions under the ‘Manage Roles’ tab > assign the roles to your sub-users. 

Note that only the account administrator can assign permissions. If you are not your account administrator and need to contact them: log into the network > click on your initials in the top right corner > click ‘Contact Administrator’. 

Now, you’re all set up for transacting with your customer! There’s so much you can do with your account, so be sure to learn what else you can do to bring out your best.

entry.title: Re: Business Network for Logistics - Freight Collaboration: Understanding the Settlement Process
entry.content: @SFC I had the same question. This video is old https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GEOPZyV2C6g It may still be relevant when it comes to at what stage FSD is getting created. It gets created after the dispute between the carrier and the shipper is sorted out.

entry.title: Re: Date to Factory Date Conversion with S/4HANA ABAP CDS view
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing! I remember an old question on this (looks like you've commented on it as well) and am also surprised there isn't some simple out of the box support.

There is a tutorial "Use Factory Calendars in a Business Object in SAP BTP ABAP environment": https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-use-factory-calendar..html

But I honestly don't understand what it does exactly... It uses built-in ADD_WORKDAYS function and says "This function makes use of the factory calendars maintained in your system." So, there is some awareness of the factory calendars? But then where is the FM equivalent?

Have you looked into this option? I've only briefly read the tutorial text, maybe missed something.

entry.title: Update of an Entity does not update data after create entity
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem during the update of Offline entity with backend errors.

I have two Entity:

  • Header
  • Items

During creation of Sales Order I Sync to Backend a ChangeSet with two Create Operations for both Header Data and Items. If the ChangeSet does not throws Errors all were synced and saved correctly to backend. If the ChangeSet throws Errors the Order is stored in the Offline Store with @SAP.inErrorState=true and @SAP.isLocal=true.

 
For example, the error is a missing attribute in one of the item.
 
When I try to Change affected Order Item I use another ChangeSet with two Update Operations for both Header and Items. The Operations are both with Replace(PUT) UpdateMode.
 
When I sync data again, the backend do not receive the changed attributes but seems to receive the same data of Creation. (I checked the backend Trace)
 
Instead of that, Offline Store seems correctly updated with changed attributes.
 
Example:
Creation:
Item.TypePos = "TANN"
Backend receive "TANN"
 
Update
Item.TypePos = "TAN"
Backend receive "TANN"
Offline Store contains "TAN"
 
This is the ChangeSet Action Code:
 
{
    "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.ChangeSet",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "ChangeSetUpdateSalesOrder"
    },
    "OnFailure": "/app/Rules/CreateSalesOrder/ChangeSetUpdateSalesOrderFail.js",
    "OnSuccess": "/app/Actions/ClosePageAndSync.action",
    "Target": {
        "Service": "/app/Services/ServiceV2.service"
    },
    "Actions": [
        "/app/Actions/EditSalesOrder/UpdateSalesOrderHeader.action",
        "/app/Rules/EditSalesOrder/UpdateSalesOrderItems.js"
    ]
}
 
This is the Update Items Rule Code:
 
import Utility from "../Utility/Utility";
/**
 * Describe this function...
 * @param {IClientAPI} clientAPI
 */
export default async function UpdateSalesOrderItems(clientAPI) {

  //get page proxy
  let pageProxy = clientAPI.getPageProxy();

  //get Application Client Data
  let applicationClient = pageProxy.getAppClientData();

  //get items
  let items = pageProxy.getAppClientData().Items;
  if (items) {
    for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
      items[i].OrderS = Utility.getHeaderPageKey(clientAPI);
      pageProxy.setActionBinding(items[i]);
      if (items[i].isNew && items[i].isNew === true) {
        await clientAPI.executeAction("/app/Actions/CreateSalesOrderActions/CreateSalesOrderItems.action");
      } else {
        if (applicationClient.isOrderLocal) {
          await clientAPI.executeAction("/app/Actions/EditSalesOrder/UpdateSalesOrderItems.action");
        } else {
          await clientAPI.executeAction("/app/Actions/CreateSalesOrderActions/CreateSalesOrderItems.action");
        }
      }

    }
  }
  return Promise.resolve();

}
 This is the Update Items Action Code:
{
    "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UpdateEntity",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "UpdateSalesOrderItems"
    },
    "Target": {
        "Service": "/app/Services/ServiceV2.service",
        "EntitySet": "ItemSet",
        "ReadLink": "{@odata.readLink}"
    },
    "Properties": {
        "Delete": "{Delete}",
        "DiscountPos": "{DiscountPos}",
        "Discount": "{Discount}",
        "OrderS": "{OrderS}",
        "Posnr": "{Posnr}",
        "Matnr": "{Matnr}",
        "RefHigh": "{RefHigh}",
        "EAN": "{EAN}",
        "CustMaterial": "{CustMaterial}",
        "ShipTo": "{ShipTo}",
        "Qty": "{Qty}",
        "UM": "{UM}",
        "DataCons": "{DataCons}",
        "Tester": "{Tester}",
        "Value": "{Value}",
        "Url": "{Url}",
        "Storage": "{Storage}",
        "TypePos": "{TypePos}",
        "Plant": "{Plant}",
        "DescriptionMat": "{DescriptionMat}",
        "AddItem": "/app/Rules/Application/Conversion/ConvertItemAddItem.js",
        "DiscScale": "{DiscScale}"
    },
    "RequestOptions": {
        "RemoveCreatedEntityAfterUpload": true,
        "UpdateMode": "Replace"
    }
}
 
What is wrong ?
 
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within th...
entry.content:
Hello @kaya-ya,

If you are removing a functional location and attaching it to another FLOC then data gets copied from the new superior FLOC. While shifting an equipment from one FLOC to another we get the option to dismantle with data transfer. 

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Datasphere oData service parameter values ​​dynamically?
entry.content: In SAP Datasphere, within a data flow connected to an oData service, is it possible to send parameter values ​​dynamically? If possible, how is this done?

entry.title: Problem updating entity after sync
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to understand how sync really works with Offline App.

I have an Order List downloaded in the Offline Store. Entity HeadSet.

The creation of Orders works correctly with a CreateEntity Action of HeadSet Entity inside a ChangeSet.

If I try to Edit an Order without change anything in the Header and send an Update request, the HeadSet, after Sync, seems not properly synced.

Steps:

  • Create Order 12345
  • Edit the Order 12345
  • Save the Order 12345 without change attributes
  • The Backend received the mapped header data.
  • The Backend sends back a success http status.
  • The App Download all the Entity included HeadSet
  • The Order in the Order List seems not properly synced because the binding contains @SAP.isLocal = true

If I try again a Sync, the order seems stuck and Backend do not receive any request.

To solve the problem I need to enter the Order, change something in the Header Data and Sync again.

After Sync:

  • The Backend received the mapped header data.
  • The Backend sends back a success http status.
  • The Order seems properly synced because the binding contains @SAP.isLocal = false

This is the Update HeadSet Action Code:

{
    "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.UpdateEntity",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "UpdateSalesOrderHeader"
    },
    "Target": {
        "Service": "/app/Services/ServiceV2.service",
        "EntitySet": "HeadSet",
        "ReadLink": "/app/Rules/EditSalesOrder/GetHeaderReadLinkUpdate.js"
    },
    "Properties": {
        "Bozza": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderDraft/#Value",
        "Datachanged": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCDataChanged/#Value",
        "UM": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCUnitOfMeasure/#Value",
        "UMSt": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCUnitOfMeasureSt/#Value",
        "Ordertype": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderType/#SelectedValue",
        "ShipTo": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderShipTo/#Value",
        "OrderReason": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderReason/#SelectedValue",
        "SoldTo": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderSoldTo/#Value",
        "RifOrd": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCRefCustomer/#Value",
        "DataTassativa": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCOrderDeliveryDate/#Value",
        "SalesOrg": "IT01",
        "Sector": "00",
        "DistrChan": "MM",
        "DataCust": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCCustomerDate/#Value",
        "DelDate": "#Page:CreateSalesOrderHeaderData/#Control:FCDeliveryDate/#Value"
    },
    "RequestOptions": {
        "SendEmptyUpdate": true,
        "UpdateMode": "Replace"
    }
}  

I think that there is a match with Uploaded Data and Downloaded Data but I'm not really sure.

Seems like Backend have different Header Order Data compared to Updated Entity Data.

What happens after sync ? How the framework recognize a not Synced Order ?

If this problem occurs how can be managed ?

Thanks.

entry.title: ケースの検索画面からサポートしているエンドユーザー様を表示することができません
entry.content:
ケースの検索画面からサポートしているエンドユーザー様を表示することができません


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ケースの検索画面からサポートしているエンドユーザー様を表示することができません
entry.content:
お客様がサービスパートナーユーザー (SPU) 機能を使用してケースを作成するためにパートナー S ユーザー ID を招待する必要がございます。

参考KBA：2518600 - お客様がサービスパートナーユーザー (SPU) 機能を使用してケースを作成するためにパートナー S ユーザー ID を招待する方法 - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

パートナーが招待を受けても、サポートしているエンドユーザー様のケースを閲覧できない場合、パートナー S ユーザー ID に、サポートしているエンドカスタマーのケースを作成するために必要なパートナー権限がありません。

これは、お客様に VAR (VAR-d) サポートを提供する SAP Partner Edge Sell パートナーにのみ関連する、特別なパートナーの S ユーザー権限です。

解決策：

貴社のパートナーセキュリティマネージャー（S ユーザー）に連絡するか、パートナーサポート（partner@sap.com）に直接メールを送信する必要があります。参考KBA：

2628152 - パートナーによるサポートパートナーがサポートする最終顧客のケースを作成、送信、表示、および終了できない - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: will Deprecated scope items still be usable?
entry.content: Thanks George for your reply. There are at least 6-12 months available for deprecated scopes.

entry.title: Re: How to define which fields and which APP will be impa...

entry.title: New Jersey SAP Community 1st Meet in 2025
entry.content:
🌟What an incredible experience at the First SAP Community Meet in 2025 New Jersey! 🌟

The event was a fantastic opportunity to meet some of the brightest minds in SAP consulting. From deep discussions on the latest SAP innovations to personal stories about overcoming challenges, it was inspiring to see such a passionate community come together.

Key Takeaways:

  • Networking: I met so many amazing SAP consultants from different industries. It’s great to know that we’re all in this journey together!
  • Innovations: The presentations on SAP S/4HANA and AI-driven business solutions were eye-opening. It’s clear that the future of SAP is full of exciting possibilities.
  • Collaboration: The roundtable discussions were invaluable, as they gave us the chance to exchange ideas and gain new perspectives from peers.

🚀I’m looking forward to attending more of these events and continuing to learn and grow with the SAP community.

 

Resource NameExpertiseContribution in Meet
Rajasekhar NethiRajasekhar Nethi possesses extensive experience across various SAP modules, showcasing a deep understanding of SAP's core functionalities and its evolving capabilities.During the session, he provided valuable insights into the latest trends in SAP, addressing advancements in technology and innovations within the SAP ecosystem. This included emerging solutions and updates that are shaping the future of SAP implementations.
Suresh SadhuSuresh Sadhu has been actively engaged in SAP Community discussions, contributed extensive knowledge and practical experiences related to SAP technologies (FICO, CFIN, FSCM).Organized and coordinated all the members to attend the meeting, making it successful. 
Sitaram ThotaSitaram Thota brings significant experience in migration of legacy SAP systems to S/4HANA environment along with selective configuration & data migration, specializing in the seamless transition of data from legacy systems to SAP environments.He shared his extensive knowledge on the intricacies of system conversion, data migration, covering key aspects such as data extraction, transformation, loading (ETL), and the critical importance of data quality and integrity throughout the migration process.
Krishna ChaitanyaKrishna Chaitanya delivered a comprehensive presentation on the integration of SAP with Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML), demonstrating their transformative potential in modern business landscapes.He offered a detailed analysis of real-world business scenarios where AI and ML are effectively applied within SAP systems. The session highlighted how these technologies can drive automation, optimize decision-making, and enhance business processes, further extending the capabilities of SAP solutions.
Phanindra Phanindra Reddy Sayala is an SAP S/4HANA PP & QM consultant specializing in digital manufacturing, IoT, and data science. He has led MES-SAP integrations, enabling real-time shop floor automation and predictive maintenance using AI.Phanindra has explained about Digital twin concept.
Scenario: A manufacturing plant has a complex assembly line with numerous machines.
Digital Twin Implementation: Sensors are installed on each machine to monitor key performance indicators like temperature, vibration, and pressure. This data is fed into a digital twin of the assembly line. 
LohithSAP FICO Techno-functional consultant with good knowledge in streamlining Pharmacy Benefit Management (SAP-PBM) solutions by integrating claims processing, formulary control, and cost optimization, while providing real-time analytics and ensuring regulatory compliance.Lohith contributed his ideas by sharing the challenges that current industries are facing and the solutions provided by SAP to enhance operational efficiency, reduce drug costs, and shared insights on how we can utilize SAP’s reporting tools to gain better understanding of medication usage, cost trends, and patient outcomes for improved decision-making.
Vishnu Vardhan MVishnu Vardhan M has over 8 years of experience as an SAP PP & QM consultant. He has played a key role in multiple SAP PP implementations, optimizing manufacturing processes. His contributions to the industry include expertise in automation, digital transformation, and sustainable manufacturing solutions.He provided a detailed analysis of how machines will handle repetitive tasks, freeing humans to focus on creativity and decision-making. By leveraging AI and robotics, manufacturing will evolve toward large-scale customization, enabling the production of personalized products. Additionally, AI will enhance sustainability by optimizing processes to minimize waste and energy consumption. Advanced technologies like Cobos, 3D printing, and AI will improve manufacturing speed, efficiency, and quality. This transformative innovation will pave the way for a smarter, more sustainable, and highly personalized future of production.

entry.title: Re: Question about Enter Count Results for Inventory Documents - Handing Units

You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Geovana

entry.title: BYD2411 Over goods receipts for Purchase Order (To Stock)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support Team,

I'm wondering if there's any built-in feature to restrict Purchase Order (To Stock type) from being goods receipted more than the original ordered quantity.

Regards,
PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2411 Over goods receipts for Purchase Order (To St...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

For To-Stock items, there is no option in the system to set a hard check for over/under delivery of it currently.

The Post Goods Receipt screen will display an information/warning message informing the user that there is an over delivery. The reason why there is no hard check for delivery quantity is to allow real world flexibility.

In warehouse there could be scenarios that the warehouse will have to receive more than what was orders (mistake from supplier, lot restrictions etc.) . In these cases we receive the excess stock and then return what is not required. 

 

If you have any other question related to this incident, do not hesitate to reply with more information. 
If the issue is resolved with above solution, kindly confirm the incident clicking on "Actions" ->"Complete". 
Thanks and have a nice day!
 
Best regards,
Aurora
SAP  Support

entry.title: Re: SWPM 1.0 Not Automatically Open Browser (sapwebdisp n...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

Yes. The user I am using does have enough authorization to run SWPM. 
Tried running SWPM on CMD (Run as Admin) and running SWPM as Administrator. 

Raph

entry.title: Re: Controlling Area in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Yes , it is only one controlling area in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by design. 

See https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/60bbd07a3b29421bbe3b87c0e1d9cfd6.html?locale=en-US&q=controlling%20area

Also see

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/308898

entry.title: Error when installing SAP B1 10 PL16 version HANA.
entry.content: Hello, we are having this error when installing SAP B1 server in SuSE Linux. We already tried creating new instance of SuSE Linux in AWS, but we still have the same error. We are using SLES15 SP5. Attached the log also in the ticket.

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM Tasks Synchronization with CBC Projects
entry.content:
Hi there,

Good day!

1. Why default company code is mandatory?

For every country/region, there should be one default company code. The default company code is required for activating the organizational structure in the target system. See, Organizational Units

2. Why Relation between Cloud Warehouse & Storage location is mandatory?

These mandatory organizational entities are in accordance to the selected Scenarios during Scoping. 

Please check KBA 3412744 - Relation between Cloud Warehouse & Storage location is mandatory for ID: #### confirmation

KBA 3165028 - Mandatory organizational units to be created and confirm button in CBC activity "Set up Organizational Structure" is grayed out

Best Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud CBC Organizational Structure Default...
entry.content: Hi there, Good day! 1. Why default company code is mandatory? For every country/region, there should be one default company code. The default company code is required for activating the organizational structure in the target system. See, Organizational Units 2. Why Relation between Cloud Warehouse & Storage location is mandatory? These mandatory organizational entities are in accordance to the selected Scenarios during Scoping. Please check KBA 3412744 - Relation between Cloud Warehouse & Storage location is mandatory for ID: #### confirmation KBA 3165028 - Mandatory organizational units to be created and confirm button in CBC activity "Set up Organizational Structure" is grayed out Best Regards, Stephen

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM Tasks Synchronization with CBC Projects
entry.content: Hi there,

entry.title: Tax code not editable when invoicing outbound delivery invoice request
entry.content:
Dear SAP support team,
we would like to change a tax code on invoice created from outbound delivery invoice request. When click on "invoice" field from the invoicing request screen view we go to item level and would like to change the tax code on first line. In the Taxes tab, the tax code field is not editable. How can we change the tax code? Why is it not editable anymore? 
Thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Tax code not editable when invoicing outbound deliver...
entry.content:
When there is a down payment assigned, the tax information is not editable in new invoice.

This is the current system behavior as designed. If you would like to change the tax information in new invoice, you may invoice the invoice request without down payment assignment.

reference KBAs:  

  • 2408717 - When Invoicing an Invoice Request, Tax Code is Not Editable if Down Payment is Assigned 
  • 2809206 - How To Work With Down Payments in Sales

entry.title: Re: New Jersey SAP Community 1st Meet in 2025
entry.content: The SAP community meet was a great learning experience, providing deep insights into cross-functional integration, the latest trends, and real-world implementation strategies. Discussions on system conversion, data migration, AI/ML, and the digital twin concept were particularly insightful. Thanks to the organizers, @Suresh_Sadhu, for facilitating such a valuable and enriching event!

entry.title: *** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=10 when starting applicatiion server
entry.content:
Hello,

This is coming from a new installation in AWS to get rid of our last on premise Sandbox environment. The aws system was installed with the same system ID for the application server (SS1) and Hana Server (SH1) with hosts names being different. After the installation was completed I was able to login in client 000 using DDIC

A backup of the on premise Sandbox was done and used for the restore of the AWS System. The default schema of the new barebone aws was SAPHANADB and was replaced with the schema SAPABAP1 from the source backup. The Profiles were adjusted to reflect the change.

After investigating the the error I used the hdbuserstore command to delete the existing Key and created a new one with the following command

hdbuserstore SET sbox "<AWS Host Name>.local:30015@SH1" SAPABAP1 <password for user SAPABAP1>

After rebooting the application server I started the instance and eventually the dispatcher service would go gray

Although I ran the hdbuserstore the trace would show the same error:

C connect to SAPHANADB/<pwd>@<AWS Host Name>.local:30015 on connection 0 ...
C *** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=10

For some  reason it is still picking up the old connection string of the original schema before the restore. I'm not sure where it's getting it from. I have looked at bunch of notes but to no avail. Any help would be great.

Thank you

entry.title: Wily Introscope セキュアストア の保護の機能について
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。

上記URLにある PSE の保護 など、AS ABAP の Tr-cd：STRUST で提供される「PSE の保護の機能は、Wily Introscope でも提供されているのでしょうか。
もし提供されているならば、設定方法など記載されたSAPノートやSAPヘルプをご教授頂けないでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope セキュアストア の保護の機能について
entry.content:
ご管理者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

Introscope EMは管理対象システムの監視データを収集するために、
Solution Managerの一部として使用されるサードパーティーソフトウェアです。

Introscopeランドスケープでは、ABAPシステムの監視データを収集することができますが（ホスト・OS情報など）、
監視対象システムのPSEファイルを管理する機能はありません。
PSEファイルに対する保護機能はWily Introscopeには提供されません。
恐れ入りますが、ご了承のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

以上、よろしくお願いします。
Haterm

entry.title: Re: How to get the total number of data point comments in...
entry.content: Transport of comment is not supported for now.

entry.title: Re: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within th...
entry.content: Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within th...
entry.content: Thank you : ) !

entry.title: Re: Fiori & CAP: getting custom action working
entry.content:
Hi,

Fiori elements OData V4 offers 3 kinds of actions - "bound" which are bound to specific instance, "unbound" which are not related to any instance and "static" - which are bound to the table entity itself and not to the specific selections within. 

In your case, you are looking for a table action that I assume should operate only on the selected rows of the table - if so you need a "bound" action defined at table level. This then needs to have an Action Parameter Dialog configured to allow user to enter the title. The backend could then return the updated instance so that the table is updated with the response.

Please read through the V4 specific sections "Bound and Unbound Actions" and "Action Parameters" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Managing IUID or UII in SAP EWM
entry.content: Thank you very much for your sharing.

entry.title: Re: In custom uploader there is no option to add the sect...
entry.content:
Thank you for your query. The Section Code feature has been added in the CE2508 release. After upgrading to CE2508, you will be able to use this field in the API.
If you have any further questions, please feel free to reach out.

entry.title: Re: Unable to call subsequent SOAP API in S/4 HANA Public...
entry.content: Thank you for your query. To the best of my knowledge, the Journal Entry SOAP APIs do not utilize the class CL_WS_PROXY_RUNTIME_OUTBOUND for outbound services. Could you please elaborate further on your use case? If you have any additional context or details, it would help us better understand your situation.
